last_assistant_message:
## Issue #17: Authentication token refresh edge case at the hour boundary

**An in-flight bug where the token refresher returns a stale token at the 60-minute mark, with PR #21 ready for merge.**

- **The problem:** Users are silently signed out after exactly one hour because the refresher hands back the previous token instead of the new one.
- **Impact:** Every signed-in user is exposed; the failure window aligns with the 1-hour session boundary and has been reproduced.
- **Where we are:** PR #21 carries the fix and the implementation is complete pending review.

<!-- erfana:explain-template -->
